title: Construction Workers' Relief: 10 Herbal Teas for Bruises
description: Echinacea purpurea teas are a natural remedy that may help with bruises. The plant contains properties and constituents like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. These compounds can help reduce swelling and pain in the affected area, making it easier to heal.  When you have a bruise, you can try drinking Echinacea purpurea tea regularly to see if it helps.
